attendees: Mteto Nyati (Chair), Dan Marokane (CEO), CFO, COO, 7 Non-Executive Directors, Company Secretary
agenda: 1. H1 FY2025 Financial Results; 2. EAF Performance Review; 3. Unbundling Progress — NTDC; 4. Debt Relief Programme Milestones; 5. Generation Recovery Plan Update
resolutions: H1 results noted. EAF of 62% acknowledged — target 65% by year end. NTDC incorporation approved. Debt relief milestone report approved for submission to National Treasury.

attendees: Andile Sangqu (Chair), Michelle Phillips (CEO), CFO, COO, 6 Non-Executive Directors, Company Secretary
agenda: 1. H1 FY2025 Results; 2. Freight Rail Recovery Plan Progress; 3. Port Throughput Performance; 4. Cable Theft Mitigation Update; 5. Private Sector Participation Framework
resolutions: H1 results noted. Freight volumes of 195 Mtpa acknowledged. Port throughput improvement plan endorsed. Private sector participation framework for Durban Container Terminal approved for submission to shareholder.

attendees: Thandeka Mgoduso (Chair), John Lamola (CEO), CFO, CCO, 5 Non-Executive Directors, Company Secretary
agenda: 1. FY2024 Annual Results; 2. Takatso Transaction Update; 3. Fleet Plan Review; 4. Route Network Optimisation; 5. Financial Sustainability Plan
resolutions: FY2024 first profitable year results approved. Takatso transaction alternative options presented to board. Fleet plan for 2025-2027 approved. Route network optimisation plan endorsed.

attendees: Monhla Hlahla (Chair), Danie du Toit (CEO), CFO, 5 Non-Executive Directors, Company Secretary
agenda: 1. FY2024 Annual Results; 2. SANDF Contract Pipeline; 3. Export Opportunities Update; 4. Recapitalisation Utilisation Report; 5. Non-Core Asset Disposals
resolutions: FY2024 return to profitability results approved. SANDF contract pipeline of ZAR 8.2 billion noted. Export licence applications for Middle East contracts approved. Non-core asset disposal plan endorsed.

companyName: South African National Roads Agency SOC Limited (SANRAL)
attendees: Themba Mhambi (Chair), Reginald Demana (CEO), CFO, 6 Non-Executive Directors, Company Secretary
agenda: 1. FY2024 Annual Results; 2. N2 Wild Coast Highway Progress; 3. Road Funding Model Review; 4. PPP Pipeline; 5. Clean Audit Outcome
resolutions: FY2024 clean audit results celebrated. N2 Wild Coast Highway Phase 1 completion noted. Road funding model submission to National Treasury approved. PPP pipeline for 3 new projects endorsed.
